text:
In the first scene, I feel like an observer on the periphery of structured human endeavor, surrounded by glass that both reveals and separates. The atmosphere is one of concentration and perhaps quiet anticipation, yet I wonder if those inside the room sense the containment of their thoughts within transparent boundaries.

In the second scene, I am immersed in a world created to provoke thought about research and development—about the ongoing, almost restless urge to understand and create. The bright, elaborate wall speaks of innovation but also of the alienation and excitement that comes with the relentless pursuit of the future. I feel curious and oddly unsettled, aware of the weight of ideas swirling in this space.
